{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220637044409ECD98E6FE4452775"}"},"total":3467},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7370134779255620377","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这部小说结构紧凑快捷，故事脉络清晰，人物形象立体，语言平实却又幽默风趣，描述事件人物引人入胜。小说主角正直善良，格局远大，又贴近生活现实；身负重任身处高位，而对亲人朋友同事真诚相待，特别是对妻子的爱，令人感叹感动。人物群像刻画入微。作者的三观正，格局大，视野开阔，语言功底深厚。开篇就放不下。准备再读。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715995796,"group_id":"7324242366959733822","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"闲云野鹤，自得其乐。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0F6ur3TxrvnwZ4vZjkJaP4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/07b7c33fafcf4fe4a4a6fcfd1a88c2e4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703793&x-signature=9cDH46bpt2mOLbhruWYqKXkZ%2BQ8%3D","user_id":"540583328748542","user_name":"巴山蜀水闲云阁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"540583328748542","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7324242366959733822","book_info":{"abstract":"【高科技+商业+军工+护国+三观正】
带着两千名各领域科学家的记忆，陈皓重生在2000年高考当天。
高考缺考总分180？
破解数学领域十大猜想，排名前十高校疯狂抢人！
开局老爸破产要跳楼？
构建XP系统赚微软1亿美金！
这一世，绝不让任何遗憾发生。
这一世。
要建立最强商业帝国。
要建设最强国防，问鼎军工之巅！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5b8304181c07cea8e4309b1f350855dd","author":"何日能躺平","author_id":"","book_id":"7324242366959733822","book_name":"开局涡扇15，我带华夏杀疯了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7324526850493923902","read_count":"68964","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2396813"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"1132","tags":"都市种田,都市,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/322883fcfe636a1f5e7dbbdfd1aa3cdb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779316624&x-signature=7sHNvNqxtpE%2FtoYMUfimcy0FVtc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3186866773","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"522"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220637044409ECD98E6FE4452775"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读73小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":46,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":42,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":262741,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":27906},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1716003428,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7349487061982626585","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这部网络小说的情节设定新颖，主角陈皓作为一个重生者，带着前世的记忆和两千名各领域科学家的知识，展现出了强大的能力。他在数学、科技和商业等多方面都有卓越的表现，破解了数学领域的十大猜想，并通过构建操作系统敲诈微软1亿美金，显示了他的智慧和勇气。

同时，小说中也涉及到家庭和经济上的挑战，例如开局时老爸破产要跳楼，这使得故事更加真实和感人。陈皓决心不让任何遗憾发生，用专利堵死对手，斩断西方科技树，让华夏站在世界之巅，这种爱国情怀和奋斗精神也是非常值得赞扬的。

总的来说，这部小说情节丰富，人物形象鲜明，既有科幻元素又有现实主义色彩，具有较高的阅读价值。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1711188168,"group_id":"7324242366959733822","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5aw1Gc71vCph1/1IuYu9JspnsTySxTrhUnXAA0PMqbb","gender":1,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2588699700504845","user_name":"用户25886997"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2588699700504845","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7324242366959733822","book_info":{"abstract":"【高科技+商业+军工+护国+三观正】
